records.display_name: Harlem Line added weeknight trains for service standards

records.display_name: Schedule supports major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects

payload.claim_text: The March 30, 2025, Schedules continue to support major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects that require extensive track outages on all three lines including Switch replacements, Track and Tie renewals, the continuation of Park Avenue Viaduct Span renewal and Walk Bridge replacement.

records.raw_text: The March 30, 2025, Schedules continue to support major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects that require extensive track outages on all three lines including Switch replacements, Track and Tie renewals, the continuation of Park Avenue Viaduct Span renewal and Walk Bridge replacement.

records.display_name: July 4th Weekend 2025 Getaway Service

payload.description: Metro-North operates getaway day with additional trains on Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines on July 3, and Sunday Service on July 4.

records.raw_text: Metro-North will operate a getaway day on Thursday, July 3, 2025, with 2 additional Trains on the Hudson Line... 2 additional Harlem Line Trains... and 3 additional Trains [on the New Haven Line]. In addition, Metro-North will operate a normal Sunday Service schedule on 4th of July.

records.display_name: March 30, 2025 Schedule Change

payload.description: Schedules change on Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines effective March 30, 2025, including service improvements, support for major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects.

records.raw_text: Schedules will change on the Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines effective Sunday, March 30, 2025.

records.display_name: New York Yankees Special Schedules 2025

payload.description: Metro-North provides Yankee Stadium service for MLB, MLS and concert events at Yankee Stadium. First game March 27, 2025, before new schedule release, with an operating schedule order.

records.raw_text: The NY Yankees will have its first official game at Yankee Stadium on Thursday, March 27, 2025, prior to the release of the New Schedule. Metro-North will provide an operating schedule order to ensure service to and from Yankee Stadium. Following the release of the March 30, 2025 schedule, Metro-North will have Yankee Stadium service for every MLB, MLS and Concert events held at Yankee Stadium.

records.display_name: Hudson Line has_claim Schedule supports major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects
records.raw_text: The March 30, 2025, Schedules continue to support major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects that require extensive track outages on all three lines including Switch replacements, Track and Tie renewals, the continuation of Park Avenue Viaduct Span renewal and Walk Bridge replacement.

records.display_name: New Haven Line has_claim New Haven Line improved connections at Stamford
records.raw_text: Improved connection time at Stamford Station for Train 1509 and 1307. Improved connection time at Stamford Station for Train 1513 and 1321.
